title: Referral vesting rule catalogue
description: Every valid vesting_rule + its dependencies + description of when to use each. The valid_vesting_rule_dependencies rule reads this catalogue. VestingScheduler.computeCompletesAt() uses it to compute vesting_completes_at at trigger time.

rules.description: Vests the moment the trigger event fires. Use for low-friction rewards (point_award, small credits) where the tenant doesn't care about refund risk.
rules.typical_use_case: Points programs where value is low + reversal effort not worth it.

rules.description: Vests N days after the trigger event fires. Standard choice for cash-adjacent rewards where the tenant wants to observe the referred user for potential refund / churn before crediting.

vesting_hold_days.description: Days between trigger_event_at + vested_at. Typical 30d aligns with most refund windows.

rules.typical_use_case: Most common. Cash + credit + free_months rewards after trigger=first_payment.

rules.description: Vests the day after the Finance module's configured refund_window closes for the underlying payment. Auto-aligns with the tenant's actual refund policy.

finance_module_refund_window_days.description: Implicit — read from Finance module (Wave 4). Default 30d on most tenants.

rules.typical_use_case: Refund-aware programs. Requires Finance module wired (Wave 4).

rules.description: Vests after the referred user completes N of some custom event. Requires a domain-event listener that tracks the count.

vesting_n_events.description: Number of events the referred user must complete before vesting.

requires.event_definition: Tenant-specific custom event (e.g. session-attended, class-completed) tracked via a custom listener that increments a counter on the referral row.

rules.typical_use_case: Engagement-based rewards. 'Reward when your referral completes 3 practice sessions.'

rules.description: Vests only when admin explicitly force-vests. Never auto-vests. Enterprise-only.
rules.typical_use_case: High-value rewards where the tenant wants human review of every payout. Requires `referrals_manual_override` entitlement.

notes: Program observers validate vesting_rule dependencies at create time. Missing required fields refuse with REFERRAL_PROGRAM_VESTING_MISSING_DEPENDENCIES.
Once a program has in-flight referrals, vesting_rule cannot be changed (REFERRAL_PROGRAM_REWARD_LOCKED).

manual_approval vesting requires Enterprise `referrals_manual_override` entitlement AT PROGRAM CREATE TIME. Downgrading a tenant from Enterprise archives manual_approval programs (they cannot proceed without the entitlement).
